description: A FEMA / U.S. Fire Administration kitchen fire-safety infographic in landscape format. A bright blue header bar runs across the top with a flat dark-blue stockpot-with-steam icon at left, the words 'Cook Safely!' in a light script-style font, and a large white headline 'Prevent Kitchen Fires.' The light-gray body is divided into columns by thin vertical rules and uses flat blue, gray, and red icons. Left column ('Did you know?' in red): a stovetop icon with a red panel and pot, captioned 'Cooking is the leading cause of home fires and home fire injuries.' (with 'Cooking' in blue). Middle column: a pot-and-person silhouette icon with 'Stay in the kitchen when you are cooking at high temperatures.' (some words in blue). Right column: a large clock icon with 'Set a timer if you are simmering or baking so you don't get distracted and forget you are cooking.' (some words in blue). Bottom-center shows agency logos: FEMA, U.S. Fire Administration (eagle seal), and 'Fire is Everyone's Fight.'
notable_text: Cook Safely! Prevent Kitchen Fires; Cooking is the leading cause of home fires and home fire injuries.; Stay in the kitchen when you are cooking at high temperatures.; Set a timer if you are simmering or baking
